title: arthraxon microphyllus
intro: Arthraxon microphyllus, also known as the small-leafed arthraxon or smallflower arthraxon, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Arthraxon microphyllus can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or infusions, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine for various health issues.
